summary: Completed frontend testing of Football Demo Selector and Simple Football Mode enhancements. All features working correctly: Football Demo Selector page at /demo/football shows Simple Mode and Advanced Mode cards with proper navigation. Simple Football Mode has Sack button (purple with Shield icon) that correctly shows defensive team players (Riverside Panthers). Rush and Pass workflows correctly show offensive players for ball carrier/QB/receiver and defensive players for tackler selection. Stats are properly updated after recording plays.
seed_data_creation: Demo mode uses hardcoded team data - Central Wolves (home) and Riverside Panthers (away)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Football Demo Selector and Simple Football Mode fully tested. Demo routes use static initial data for teams and players. Central Wolves is home team with possession, Riverside Panthers is away team (defensive).
